prompt: 我用 Aria 管理一个 Forgejo 上的项目，最近积累了一些 open issues 不知道哪些是阻塞性的。我想在开发新 feature 前先扫描项目状态同时了解 open issues。我的 .aria/config.json 中 state_scanner.issue_scan.enabled 设置为 true，platform 是 forgejo。请扫描并展示 issues。

assertions.text: Shows 🎫 Open Issues section with open issues list when enabled=true
Detects Forgejo platform via 4-tier priority (config -> hostname -> URL -> fallback)
Calls forgejo CLI wrapper, not raw curl
Handles 10 fetch_error enum values with proper fail-soft degradation
Does NOT manage API tokens inside the skill
Attempts heuristic linking to US-NNN or OpenSpec change names with word boundary protection
Recommends triage for blocker/critical labeled issues (open_blocker_issues rule)
